description: Workflow LIVE VERIFIED: deal · zmiana etapu · event do orkiestracji. Wszystkie 3 kroki działają na produkcji.
workflowName: deal · zmiana etapu · event do orkiestracji

architecture.note: Code step uses embedded API call (workaround for empty logicFunctionInput on Twenty Cloud). Function fetches latest updated Opportunity via Twenty GraphQL API, builds EVENT_CONTRACT payload, and returns it as payloadJson string.
architecture.workaround_reason: Twenty Cloud does not auto-map trigger data to Code step params. The logicFunctionInput field is empty ({}) and cannot be set via UI or API key. Embedded API call is a reliable workaround for POC.
architecture.future_fix: When Twenty deploys PR #18002 (auto-derive logicFunctionInput from code schema), or when MCP OAuth access allows updateWorkflowVersionStep, switch to direct params mapping.

steps.name: Code - Logic Function
steps.description: Fetches latest updated Opportunity via API, maps stage to event_name, builds EVENT_CONTRACT payload as JSON string.
steps.knownBug: biz_product uses camelToSnake which breaks ALL_CAPS values: 'WEB' → '_w_e_b'. Fix: use .toLowerCase() instead.

testRecord.name: Strona Internetowa dla Wypożyczalni Sprzętu Eventowego

liveTestResults.verdict: PASS — all 3 steps executed. One cosmetic bug: biz_product camelToSnake on ALL_CAPS.
